name: Steel Round Metal Mesh Accent Patio End Table Ivory - Room Essentials™
description:
Refresh your outdoor space with this Steel Round Metal Mesh Accent Patio End Table from Room Essentials™. This round patio table features an off-white powder-coated and E-coated steel frame with rust-resistant properties. It has a mesh tabletop that's perfect for holding drinks, snacks or books, and folding legs that make it easy to store when not in use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
